title: rootless overlayfs: lacking support for overlay volumes
body:
In containers/storage#816, support was added for rootless overlayfs mounts: `userxattr` is passed onto the overlay mount for `/` in this case.

However, overlay volume mounts (`-v /foo:/foo:O`) do not use the `userxattr` flag in the mount call, which results in issues where directories cannot be renamed because EXDEV is returned, see https://www.kernel.org/doc/html/latest/filesystems/overlayfs.html#renaming-directories

Proposed fix: Also add `userxattr` to the overlay volume mount(2) calls.

comments.body: yes, @flouthoc could you open a PR?
